---
title: "Vercel Blob (txt)"
description: "MCP-only template that stores private .txt blobs on Vercel Blob using UUID hex IDs"
---

<Info>
  **Source:** [`examples/with-vercel-blob`](https://github.com/AgentlyHQ/aixyz/tree/main/examples/with-vercel-blob)
</Info>

## Overview

This template exposes two MCP tools, `put-text` and `get-text`, that write and read **private** `.txt` files to/from Vercel Blob using `@vercel/blob`. IDs are generated as UUID hex strings (no base58) and each call is priced at `$0.001` via x402. There is **no** `app/agent.ts` — the server only serves `/mcp`.

## Project Structure

```
with-vercel-blob/
├── aixyz.config.ts             # Agent metadata + x402 config
├── app/
│   ├── icon.svg                # Template icon
│   └── tools/
│       ├── put-text.ts         # Write txt blob
│       ├── get-text.ts         # Read txt blob
│       └── path.test.ts        # Deterministic helper tests
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
└── vercel.json
```

## Tools

### `put-text`

```typescript title="app/tools/putTxt.ts"
import { put } from "@vercel/blob";
import { tool } from "ai";

export default tool({
  description: "Store a private UTF-8 .txt file (up to 50k chars) in Vercel Blob and return its URLs.",
  inputSchema: z.object({
    text: z.string().min(1).max(50_000), // matches MAX_TEXT_LENGTH in source
    folder: z
      .string()
      .regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9/_-]+$/)
      .optional(), // default: txt/
  }),
  execute: async ({ text, folder }) => {
    const { id, path } = buildTxtPath(folder);
    const blob = await put(path, text, {
      access: "private",
      contentType: "text/plain; charset=utf-8",
      addRandomSuffix: false,
      allowOverwrite: false,
      token: process.env.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN!,
    });
    return { id, url: blob.url, path, downloadUrl: blob.downloadUrl };
  },
});
```

Key behaviors:

- **UUID hex IDs** — `crypto.randomUUID().replace(/-/g, "")`, stored at `folder/{id}.txt`
- **Access control** — `access: "private"` + `allowOverwrite: false`
- **No metadata envelope** — payload is exactly the text provided

### `get-text`

```typescript title="app/tools/get-text.ts"
export default tool({
  description: "Fetch a private .txt blob from Vercel Blob and return its text content.",
  inputSchema: z.object({
    path: z.string().min(1), // blob pathname like txt/<uuid>.txt or full URL
  }),
  execute: async ({ path }) => {
    const result = await get(path, { access: "private", token: process.env.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN! });
    if (result.statusCode === 304) return { path: result.blob.pathname, text: "" };
    const text = await new Response(result.stream).text();
    return { path: result.blob.pathname, text, contentType: result.blob.contentType, size: result.blob.size };
  },
});
```

## Environment

Set a Vercel Blob read/write token before running locally:

```bash
echo 'BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN=...' >> .env.local
```

## Payment

`putTxt` charges `$0.001` per call using the x402 settings in `aixyz.config.ts` (Base mainnet in production, Base Sepolia in development).

## Running locally

```bash
cd examples/with-vercel-blob
bun install
bun run dev
```

Connect any MCP client (Claude Desktop, VS Code MCP extension, etc.) to `http://localhost:3000/mcp` and call `putTxt` with the schema above.
